name: @protolabs/a2a
description: protoLabs A2A conventions layer — a thin, self-describing wrapper on top of the canonical @a2a-js/sdk 1.0. Carries only protoLabs specifics: the four custom extensions (cost / confidence / worldstate-delta / tool-call), AgentCard defaults, the auth scheme, the bus-state boundary, and Part helpers. The SDK owns the protocol; this package owns the conventions.
